  "text": "Security boundary audit of the GDScript VM in Godot 4.3-stable:\n\n## GDScript VM Bytecode Interpreter & Opcode Dispatch\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_vm.cpp**: The core bytecode interpreter. Contains `GDScriptFunction::call()` which implements the main opcode dispatch loop (a large switch/goto dispatch over `GDScriptFunction::Opcode` enum values). This is where all script instructions are executed.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_function.h** and **gdscript_function.cpp**: Define `GDScriptFunction` class, which holds the bytecode, constants, stack layout, and opcode definitions (the `Opcode` enum). Call frames are managed via the `CallState` struct embedded in `GDScriptFunction`.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_disassembler.cpp**: Implements `GDScriptFunction::disassemble()` for debug disassembly of bytecode.\n\n## Bytecode Code Generation\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_byte_codegen.cpp** and **gdscript_byte_codegen.h**: `GDScriptByteCodeGenerator` translates AST/IR into bytecode instructions, including call opcodes (`write_call`, `write_call_self`, etc.).\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_codegen.h**: Abstract base `GDScriptCodeGenerator` interface for code generation.\n\n## GDScript Script Lifecycle\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript.cpp** and **gdscript.h**: `GDScript` class (the script resource) and `GDScriptLanguage` (the script language singleton). Key security-relevant methods: `GDScript::is_tool()` (checks if @tool annotation is set), `GDScriptLanguage::reload_tool_script()` (re-executes tool scripts in editor context), and the `can_run` check gating `ScriptServer::is_scripting_enabled() || is_tool()`.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_compiler.cpp** and **gdscript_compiler.h**: `GDScriptCompiler` compiles parsed AST into `GDScriptFunction` bytecode. Propagates `tool` flag from parser to script: `p_script->tool = parser->is_tool()`.\n\n## Parser & Analyzer (tool/permission annotation)\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_parser.cpp** and **gdscript_parser.h**: `GDScriptParser` parses source into AST. Tracks `_is_tool` flag set by the `@tool` annotation. `GDScriptParser::is_tool()` is the source of truth for tool script status.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_analyzer.cpp** and **gdscript_analyzer.h**: `GDScriptAnalyzer` performs type-checking and semantic analysis on the AST.\n\n## Callable & Utility Subsystems\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_lambda_callable.cpp** and **gdscript_lambda_callable.h**: `GDScriptLambdaCallable` wraps lambda/closure calls.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_utility_callable.cpp** and **gdscript_utility_callable.h**: Wraps built-in utility function calls exposed to scripts.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_utility_functions.cpp** and **gdscript_utility_functions.h**: Registers and implements all built-in utility functions (print, range, etc.) accessible from GDScript.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_rpc_callable.cpp** and **gdscript_rpc_callable.h**: `GDScriptRPCCallable` handles RPC-decorated method calls.\n\n## Script Registration\n- **modules/gdscript/register_types.cpp** and **register_types.h**: `register_gdscript_types()` registers GDScript with the engine's ClassDB and ScriptServer, controlling what is exposed to scripts.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_cache.cpp** and **gdscript_cache.h**: `GDScriptCache` manages script loading and caching.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_editor.cpp**: Editor-specific GDScript integration (code completion, script validation in editor).\n\n## Object::call / Object::callp Dispatch\n- **core/object/object.cpp** and **core/object/object.h**: `Object` base class. `Object::callp()` is the universal method dispatch entry point — all script-initiated calls into C++ objects go through this. Checks ClassDB for method bindings and dispatches to `MethodBind`.\n- **core/object/method_bind.cpp** and **core/object/method_bind.h**: `MethodBind` base class wraps C++ methods registered with ClassDB, enforcing argument count and type validation before dispatch.\n- **core/object/callable_method_pointer.cpp** and **core/object/callable_method_pointer.h**: Callable wrappers for method pointers used in signals/calls.\n\n## ClassDB API Exposure Control\n- **core/object/class_db.cpp** and **core/object/class_db.h**: `ClassDB` singleton controls all C++ class/method/property registration. Only methods registered via `ClassDB::bind_method()` are accessible from scripts. This is the primary gatekeeper for the engine API surface exposed to GDScript.\n\n## Script Language Abstraction\n- **core/object/script_language.cpp** and **core/object/script_language.h**: `ScriptLanguage` abstract interface (implemented by `GDScriptLanguage`). `ScriptServer` manages all registered languages and the `is_scripting_enabled()` flag.\n- **core/object/script_language_extension.cpp** and **core/object/script_language_extension.h**: GDExtension bindings for script languages.\n- **core/object/script_instance.cpp** and **core/object/script_instance.h**: `ScriptInstance` interface implemented by each script attached to an Object, including `callp()` for script-side method dispatch.\n\n## EditorScript / ToolScript Permissions\n- **editor/editor_script.cpp** and **editor/editor_script.h**: `EditorScript` class — the base for scripts run via File > Run in Editor. Defines the `_run()` virtual method called by the editor. `add_root_node()` and `get_scene()` guard against calls made outside the editor context by checking `EditorNode::get_singleton()`.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_parser.cpp**: `@tool` annotation handler sets `_is_tool = true`, enabling tool/editor mode for GDScript files.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript.cpp**: `can_run` check: `ScriptServer::is_scripting_enabled() || is_tool()` — tool scripts bypass the scripting-disabled guard to run in editor.\n\n## Other Relevant GDScript Files\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_tokenizer.cpp** / **gdscript_tokenizer.h** / **gdscript_tokenizer_buffer.cpp** / **gdscript_tokenizer_buffer.h**: Lexer/tokenizer for GDScript source.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_warning.cpp** / **gdscript_warning.h**: Warning system for static analysis.\n- **core/object/message_queue.cpp** / **core/object/message_queue.h**: Deferred call queue used by `Object::call_deferred()`.\n- **core/object/ref_counted.cpp** / **core/object/ref_counted.h**: Reference-counted object base (used by GDScript and Script resources)."
}

  "text": "Security boundary audit of the GDScript VM in Godot 4.3-stable:\n\n## GDScript VM Bytecode Interpreter & Opcode Dispatch\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_vm.cpp**: The core bytecode interpreter. Contains `GDScriptFunction::call()` which implements the main opcode dispatch loop (a large switch/goto dispatch over the `GDScriptFunction::Opcode` enum). This is where all script instructions are executed and represents the primary security boundary between script code and the engine.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_function.h** and **gdscript_function.cpp**: Define the `GDScriptFunction` class, which holds bytecode, constants, stack layout, and the `Opcode` enum listing every supported bytecode instruction. Call frame management is handled via the `CallState` struct embedded in `GDScriptFunction`.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_disassembler.cpp**: Implements `GDScriptFunction::disassemble()` for debug-mode bytecode inspection.\n\n## Bytecode Code Generation\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_byte_codegen.cpp** and **gdscript_byte_codegen.h**: `GDScriptByteCodeGenerator` translates AST/IR into bytecode instructions, including call opcodes (`write_call`, `write_call_self`, etc.).\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_codegen.h**: Abstract base `GDScriptCodeGenerator` interface.\n\n## GDScript Script Lifecycle & Tool Permissions\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript.cpp** and **gdscript.h**: `GDScript` (the script resource) and `GDScriptLanguage` (language singleton). Key security-relevant logic: `GDScript::is_tool()` (checks @tool annotation), `GDScriptLanguage::reload_tool_script()` (re-executes tool scripts in editor), and the `can_run` guard: `ScriptServer::is_scripting_enabled() || is_tool()` which allows tool scripts to bypass the scripting-disabled check.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_compiler.cpp** and **gdscript_compiler.h**: `GDScriptCompiler` compiles AST to `GDScriptFunction` bytecode. Propagates the tool flag: `p_script->tool = parser->is_tool()`.\n\n## Parser & Analyzer (@tool annotation)\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_parser.cpp** and **gdscript_parser.h**: `GDScriptParser` parses source into AST and tracks `_is_tool` (set by the `@tool` annotation handler). `GDScriptParser::is_tool()` is the authoritative source of the tool flag.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_analyzer.cpp** and **gdscript_analyzer.h**: `GDScriptAnalyzer` performs type-checking and semantic analysis.\n\n## Callable & Utility Subsystems\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_lambda_callable.cpp/.h**: `GDScriptLambdaCallable` wraps lambda/closure invocations.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_utility_callable.cpp/.h**: `GDScriptUtilityCallable` wraps built-in utility function calls exposed to scripts.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_utility_functions.cpp/.h**: Registers and implements all built-in utility functions (print, range, etc.) accessible from GDScript.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_rpc_callable.cpp/.h**: `GDScriptRPCCallable` handles RPC-decorated method calls.\n\n## Script Registration & Cache\n- **modules/gdscript/register_types.cpp/.h**: `register_gdscript_types()` registers GDScript with ClassDB and ScriptServer, controlling what engine APIs are exposed to scripts.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_cache.cpp/.h**: `GDScriptCache` manages script loading and caching.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_editor.cpp**: Editor-specific GDScript integration.\n\n## Object::call / Object::callp Dispatch\n- **core/object/object.cpp** and **core/object/object.h**: `Object` base class. `Object::callp()` is the universal method dispatch entry point — all script-initiated calls into C++ objects pass through here. Consults ClassDB for registered method bindings.\n- **core/object/method_bind.cpp/.h**: `MethodBind` wraps registered C++ methods, enforcing argument count and type validation before dispatch.\n- **core/object/callable_method_pointer.cpp/.h**: Callable wrappers for method pointers.\n\n## ClassDB API Exposure Control\n- **core/object/class_db.cpp** and **core/object/class_db.h**: `ClassDB` singleton — the primary gatekeeper for the engine API surface exposed to scripts. Only methods registered via `ClassDB::bind_method()` (or equivalents) are accessible from GDScript. Controls class hierarchy visibility, method/property/signal registration.\n\n## Script Language Abstraction\n- **core/object/script_language.cpp/.h**: `ScriptLanguage` abstract interface (implemented by `GDScriptLanguage`) and `ScriptServer` (manages all languages and the `is_scripting_enabled()` flag that gates runtime execution).\n- **core/object/script_language_extension.cpp/.h**: GDExtension bindings for script languages.\n- **core/object/script_instance.cpp/.h**: `ScriptInstance` interface — per-object script binding, including `callp()` for script-side method dispatch.\n\n## EditorScript / ToolScript Permissions\n- **editor/editor_script.cpp** and **editor/editor_script.h**: `EditorScript` — base class for scripts run via File > Run in Editor. Defines the `_run()` virtual entry point. Methods `add_root_node()` and `get_scene()` guard against calls outside the editor context by checking `EditorNode::get_singleton()`.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_parser.cpp**: `@tool` annotation handler sets `_is_tool = true`, enabling editor/tool mode.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript.cpp**: `can_run` check: `ScriptServer::is_scripting_enabled() || is_tool()` — tool scripts bypass the scripting-disabled guard to run in editor context."

## GDScript VM Security Boundary Audit

### Script Lifecycle & Tool Permissions
- **`modules/gdscript/gdscript.cpp/.h`** — `GDScript`, `GDScriptLanguage`: `is_tool()`, `reload_tool_script()`, `can_run` guard
- **`modules/gdscript/gdscript_compiler.cpp/.h`** — `GDScriptCompiler`: propagates the tool flag

- **`core/object/object.cpp/.h`** — `Object::callp()`: universal method dispatch gateway
- **`core/object/class_db.cpp/.h`** — `ClassDB`: primary gatekeeper for engine API surface exposed to scripts
- **`core/object/method_bind.cpp/.h`** — `MethodBind`: validates arguments before C++ dispatch
- **`core/object/script_language.cpp/.h`** — `ScriptLanguage`, `ScriptServer::is_scripting_enabled()`
- **`core/object/script_instance.cpp/.h`** — `ScriptInstance::callp()`

### EditorScript / ToolScript
- **`editor/editor_script.cpp/.h`** — `EditorScript`: `_run()` entry point with `EditorNode` guards

  "text": "Security boundary audit of the GDScript VM in Godot 4.3-stable:\n\n## GDScript VM Bytecode Interpreter & Opcode Dispatch\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_vm.cpp**: The core bytecode interpreter. This is where all script instructions are executed and represents the primary security boundary between script code and the engine.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_function.h** and **gdscript_function.cpp**: Define the `GDScriptFunction` class, which holds bytecode, constants, stack layout, and the `Opcode` enum listing every supported bytecode instruction. Call frame management is handled via the `CallState` struct embedded in `GDScriptFunction`.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_disassembler.cpp**: Implements `GDScriptFunction::disassemble()` for debug-mode bytecode inspection.\n\n## Bytecode Code Generation\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_byte_codegen.cpp** and **gdscript_byte_codegen.h**: `GDScriptByteCodeGenerator` translates AST/IR into bytecode instructions, including call opcodes (`write_call`, `write_call_self`, etc.).\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_codegen.h**: Abstract base `GDScriptCodeGenerator` interface.\n\n## GDScript Script Lifecycle & Tool Permissions\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript.cpp** and **gdscript.h**: `GDScript` (the script resource) and `GDScriptLanguage` (language singleton). Key security-relevant logic: `GDScript::is_tool()` (checks @tool annotation), `GDScriptLanguage::reload_tool_script()` (re-executes tool scripts in editor), and the `can_run` guard: `ScriptServer::is_scripting_enabled() || is_tool()` which allows tool scripts to bypass the scripting-disabled check.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_compiler.cpp** and **gdscript_compiler.h**: `GDScriptCompiler` compiles AST to `GDScriptFunction` bytecode. Propagates the tool flag: `p_script->tool = parser->is_tool()`.\n\n## Parser & Analyzer (@tool annotation)\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_parser.cpp** and **gdscript_parser.h**: `GDScriptParser` parses source into AST and tracks `_is_tool` (set by the `@tool` annotation handler). `GDScriptParser::is_tool()` is the authoritative source of the tool flag.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_analyzer.cpp** and **gdscript_analyzer.h**: `GDScriptAnalyzer` performs type-checking and semantic analysis.\n\n## Callable & Utility Subsystems\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_lambda_callable.cpp/.h**: `GDScriptLambdaCallable` wraps lambda/closure invocations.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_utility_callable.cpp/.h**: `GDScriptUtilityCallable` wraps built-in utility function calls exposed to scripts.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_utility_functions.cpp/.h**: Registers and implements all built-in utility functions (print, range, etc.) accessible from GDScript.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_rpc_callable.cpp/.h**: `GDScriptRPCCallable` handles RPC-decorated method calls.\n\n## Script Registration & Cache\n- **modules/gdscript/register_types.cpp/.h**: `register_gdscript_types()` registers GDScript with ClassDB and ScriptServer, controlling what engine APIs are exposed to scripts.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_cache.cpp/.h**: `GDScriptCache` manages script loading and caching.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_editor.cpp**: Editor-specific GDScript integration.\n\n## Object::call / Object::callp Dispatch\n- **core/object/object.cpp** and **core/object/object.h**: `Object` base class. `Object::callp()` is the universal method dispatch entry point — all script-initiated calls into C++ objects pass through here. Consults ClassDB for registered method bindings.\n- **core/object/method_bind.cpp/.h**: `MethodBind` wraps registered C++ methods, enforcing argument count and type validation before dispatch.\n- **core/object/callable_method_pointer.cpp/.h**: Callable wrappers for method pointers.\n\n## ClassDB API Exposure Control\n- **core/object/class_db.cpp** and **core/object/class_db.h**: `ClassDB` singleton — the primary gatekeeper for the engine API surface exposed to scripts. Only methods registered via `ClassDB::bind_method()` (or equivalents) are accessible from GDScript. Controls class hierarchy visibility, method/property/signal registration.\n\n## Script Language Abstraction\n- **core/object/script_language.cpp/.h**: `ScriptLanguage` abstract interface (implemented by `GDScriptLanguage`) and `ScriptServer` (manages all languages and the `is_scripting_enabled()` flag that gates runtime execution).\n- **core/object/script_language_extension.cpp/.h**: GDExtension bindings for script languages.\n- **core/object/script_instance.cpp/.h**: `ScriptInstance` interface — per-object script binding, including `callp()` for script-side method dispatch.\n\n## EditorScript / ToolScript Permissions\n- **editor/editor_script.cpp** and **editor/editor_script.h**: `EditorScript` — base class for scripts run via File > Run in Editor. Defines the `_run()` virtual entry point. Methods `add_root_node()` and `get_scene()` guard against calls outside the editor context by checking `EditorNode::get_singleton()`.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript_parser.cpp**: `@tool` annotation handler sets `_is_tool = true`, enabling editor/tool mode.\n- **modules/gdscript/gdscript.cpp**: `can_run` check: `ScriptServer::is_scripting_enabled() || is_tool()` — tool scripts bypass the scripting-disabled guard to run in editor context."
